commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content:
Father. He hath known her; and to him she belongs, as being one flesh. (Haydock)
If he were even dead, it would show a want of respect to marry his widow, though she were not your own mother. (Calmet)
This law, Ruben and the incestuous Corinthian transgressed. (Tirinus)
